\section{Performance}
\label{sec:perf}

The runtime checks are not free, and we summarize their cost here.
Measured across representative workloads, type checking together with ability enforcement incurs on average roughly a 20\% slowdown on executing transactions, and reference safety checking incurs on average roughly a 40\% slowdown.
Both numbers are with synchronous checking; the asynchronous mode of Section~\ref{sec:async} amortizes a significant portion of this cost onto otherwise idle workers and is the default in production.
